attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  ,        
BK_COMPANY_CODE        ,       
BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY     ,      
BK_SO_NUMBER_INT         ,     
BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT     ,    
BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT ,   
BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT        ,  
BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,
START_TV_DATETIME             ,
START_SSP_DATE                ,
END_TV_DATETIME               ,
END_SSP_DATE                  ,
BOOKINGS_PERCENT              ,
ORDER_QUANTITY                ,
UNIT_SALE_PRICE               ,
UNIT_LIST_PRICE               ,
UNIT_TRADE_IN_USD_AMOUNT      ,
REVENUE_TYPE_CODE             ,
ITEM_TYPE_CODE                ,
CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME         ,
CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_CODE      ,
SHIPPED_QUANTITY              ,
SO_LINE_CLOSED_DATE           ,
ERP_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT    ,
SO_LINE_OPEN_FLAG             ,
SCHEDULED_SHIP_DATE           ,
CUST_REQUESTED_SHIPMENT_DATE  ,
PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE,
CUST_SHIPMENT_RECOMMIT_DATE   ,
SHIP_SET_NUMBER_INT           ,
INVOICED_QUANTITY             ,
SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_RESULT_CODE,
SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DATE       ,
FACTORY_RECOMMIT_DATE         ,
FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE          ,
PICK_RELEASE_DATE             ,
PICK_RELEASE_RESULT_CODE      ,
CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_CODE    ,
CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_DATE    ,
SO_LINE_OPTION_FLAG           ,
AR_INTERFACE_RESULT_CODE      ,
AR_INTERFACE_DATETIME         ,
RU_SOL_RETURN_CONTEXT_CODE    ,
RU_SOL_RETURN_REASON_CODE     ,
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM ,
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM   ,
RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER    ,
BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME        ,
BK_SO_SRC_UPD_DATETIME        ,
SERVICE_CONTRACT_ROLE         ,
MAJOR_LINE_TYPE               ,
SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE     ,
SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT             ,
EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
SS_CODE                       ,
CANCELLED_FLAG                ,
ITEM_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION     ,
PRICING_DATETIME              ,
PRODUCT_KEY                   ,
SALES_ORDER_KEY               ,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          ,
RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY   ,
EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
ADVANCED_SERVICES_PROJECT_CD  ,
RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
LINE_STATUS_CD                ,
COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CD       ,
SOL_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME  ,
SOL_MODIFIED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME ,
DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM     ,
CISCO_SCHEDULED_RESULT_DTM    ,
PICK_RELEASE_DTM              ,
DV_SOL_CANCELLED_QTY          ,
DD_PARENT_LINE_PRODUCT_KEY    ,
DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG      ,
DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD        ,
ACTION_CODE                   ,
DML_TYPE    ,
DD_ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DTM,
DV_ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DT,
ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_LINE_REF_ID,
ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_WEB_ORDER_ID,
SALES_ORDER_LINE_RMA_AAR_NUM,
BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD,
ELA_CONTRACT_START_DT,
ELA_CONTRACT_END_DT,
ELA_DEAL_ID,
BOOKING_SOURCE,
HYBRID_OFFER_FLAG,
PRDT_TRIAL_EXPIRATION_DTM,
BK_SO_SRC_NAME,
/* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
END_CUST_ACCT_KEY,
BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD,
/*Added as part of SFP Rel - NOV*/
BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SRC_TYPE,
BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
/*Added as part of FY22 PR21892 - EDW_AVENGERS_Q1FY22 */
ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
ORC_ORDER_SOURCE_ID,
INITIAL_PRODUCT_LEASE_TYPE_NAME,
ORG_SYSTEM_LINE_NUM
FROM
(
SELECT 
SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 						SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE 							BK_COMPANY_CODE,
EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY							BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
NSOT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT   						BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
SCOOLA.LINE_NUMBER	 							BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
SCOOLA.SHIPMENT_NUMBER   						BK_SHIPMENT_LOT_NUMBER_INT,
COALESCE (SCOOLA.OPTION_NUMBER,0 )  			BK_OPTION_NUMBER_INT,
COALESCE( NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE ,'UNKNOWN')	BK_SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE,	 
SCOOLA.CREATION_DATE 							START_TV_DATETIME,
CAST (SCOOLA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE)				START_SSP_DATE,
CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))	END_TV_DATETIME,
'3500-01-01'									END_SSP_DATE  ,
100.000000 BOOKINGS_PERCENT, /*LOADED FROM LINE_EXT TABLE*/
COALESCE(SCOOLA.ORDERED_QUANTITY,0)  			ORDER_QUANTITY ,
COALESCE(SCOOLA.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,0) 			UNIT_SALE_PRICE ,
COALESCE(SCOOLA.UNIT_LIST_PRICE,0) 				UNIT_LIST_PRICE,
0	UNIT_TRADE_IN_USD_AMOUNT , /* Obselete for CG.Hardcoded to 0*/
		CASE
			WHEN	CONTEXT IN ('FUTURES','ELDCHASSISID','ELDRLKREG','EMAILDLAONLY','ICDLVER','ICDLVERCCO','ICDLVERCSD') 
						THEN NULL
			ELSE	SCOOLA.ATTRIBUTE4
		END										REVENUE_TYPE_CODE,
ITEM_TYPE_CODE 									ITEM_TYPE_CODE,
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))						CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME,
NULL 											CISCO_BOOKED_STATUS_CODE ,
CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='GOODS' THEN COALESCE(SCOOLA.SHIPPED_QUANTITY,COALESCE(SCOOLA.FULFILLED_QUANTITY,0)) 
 ELSE COALESCE(SCOOLA.SHIPPED_QUANTITY,0) END                                        SHIPPED_QUANTITY,
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))						SO_LINE_CLOSED_DATE, /*LOADED FROM WORKFLOW TABLE*/
SCOOLA.SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID 						ERP_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT,
SCOOLA.OPEN_FLAG 								SO_LINE_OPEN_FLAG,
SCOOLA.SCHEDULE_SHIP_DATE            	SCHEDULED_SHIP_DATE,
CAST(SCOOLA.REQUEST_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')	CUST_REQUESTED_SHIPMENT_DATE, 
/* BEGIN CASE AS PART OF SC-LSS Q3FY15 */
/* CASE WHEN NSOVT.REQUEST_DATE_BASIS_CD  = 'SHIP' THEN 
CAST(SCOOLA.PROMISE_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') ELSE NULL END AS PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE */

CAST(SCOOLA.PROMISE_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE
/* END CASE AS PART OF SC-LSS Q3FY15 */ 
,SCOOLA.PROMISE_DATE  CUST_SHIPMENT_RECOMMIT_DATE ,  /* Need to be confirmed by Bhaskar */
NULL 											SHIP_SET_NUMBER_INT, /* Need to be confirmed by Bhaskar */
COALESCE(SCOOLA.INVOICED_QUANTITY,0)  			INVOICED_QUANTITY,
'NA' AS SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_RESULT_CODE, /*LOADED FROM LINE_EXT TABLE*/
NULL AS SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DATE, /*LOADED FROM LINE_EXT TABLE*/
CAST( NULL AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')			FACTORY_RECOMMIT_DATE,
SCOOLA.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE 					FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE,
CAST( NULL AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')			PICK_RELEASE_DATE, 
NULL 											PICK_RELEASE_RESULT_CODE,
SCOOLA.SCHEDULE_STATUS_CODE						CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_CODE, 
CAST( NULL AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')			CISCO_SCHEDULE_RESULT_DATE, /*LOADED FROM WORKFLOW TABLE*/
CASE
    WHEN ITEM_TYPE_CODE not in ('STANDARD','MODEL','SERVICE')  THEN'Y'
    ELSE 'N'
END SO_LINE_OPTION_FLAG, /*OM LSS Q4FY14*/
NULL 											AR_INTERFACE_RESULT_CODE, 
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))						AR_INTERFACE_DATETIME ,
SCOOLA.RETURN_CONTEXT 							RU_SOL_RETURN_CONTEXT_CODE,
SCOOLA.RETURN_REASON_CODE 						RU_SOL_RETURN_REASON_CODE,
CASE WHEN SCOOLA.CREATION_DATE>EXT_BATCH.ACV_INC_DATE
THEN COALESCE(EXT.CONTRACT_START_DATE,SCOOLA.SERVICE_START_DATE)  
ELSE SCOOLA.SERVICE_START_DATE END AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM,
CASE WHEN SCOOLA.CREATION_DATE>EXT_BATCH.ACV_INC_DATE
THEN COALESCE(EXT.CONTRACT_END_DATE,SCOOLA.SERVICE_END_DATE)  
ELSE SCOOLA.SERVICE_END_DATE END AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM,
NULL RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
SCOOLA.CREATION_DATE  							BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
SCOOLA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE  						BK_SO_SRC_UPD_DATETIME,
'=' AS SERVICE_CONTRACT_ROLE, /*LOADED FROM LINE_EXT TABLE*/
CASE
    WHEN ITEM_TYPE_CODE  in ('STANDARD','MODEL','SERVICE')  THEN 'MAJOR'
    ELSE 'MINOR'
END MAJOR_LINE_TYPE, /*OM LSS Q4FY14*/
SCOOLA.LINE_CATEGORY_CODE				SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
SCOOLA.LINE_ID 									SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
USER 											EDW_CREATE_USER,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 						SS_CODE, 
COALESCE(SCOOLA.CANCELLED_FLAG,'=') 			CANCELLED_FLAG,
MC.SEGMENT3    							                ITEM_CATEGORY_DESCRIPTION ,/* Modified -usinf Sjprod EL tables*/
SCOOLA.PRICING_DATE  							PRICING_DATETIME,
NP.ITEM_KEY 									PRODUCT_KEY,
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY 							SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NECAL_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY 		SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
CASE
			WHEN	SCOOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
			ELSE	COALESCE (SSOL_PARENT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, -9999)
		END										RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  USER  										EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  							EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)   							EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
NULL AS ADVANCED_SERVICES_PROJECT_CD , /*LOADED FROM LINE_EXT TABLE*/
NULL AS RU_BUNDLE_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, /*LOADED FROM LINE_EXT TABLE*/
COALESCE(SCOOLA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE,'=')       LINE_STATUS_CD,
CASE WHEN SCOOLA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE       
  IN
( 'CLOSED' , 'CANCELLED' ) THEN FLOW_STATUS_CODE       
 ELSE '=' END COMPLETE_LINE_RESULT_CD,
COALESCE(EFU_CR.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') SOL_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
COALESCE(EFU_UPD.USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN') SOL_MODIFIED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) DD_SHIPMENT_CONFIRMED_DTM,
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) CISCO_SCHEDULED_RESULT_DTM,
 CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) PICK_RELEASE_DTM,
SCOOLA.CANCELLED_QUANTITY  AS DV_SOL_CANCELLED_QTY,
NULL DD_PARENT_LINE_PRODUCT_KEY,
(CASE WHEN NIC.ITEM_CLASS_NAME='Option class' 
        THEN 'Y' 
        ELSE 'N' END) AS DV_OPTION_CLASS_LINE_FLG , /*Added in rel10 */
CASE WHEN REVENUE_TYPE_CODE IN('P','Q','M','p','q','m') THEN 'New'
WHEN  REVENUE_TYPE_CODE  IN('R','r')  THEN 'Renewal'
ELSE  'Others'
END    DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
 'I' ACTION_CODE,
'=' DML_TYPE,
SCOOLA.ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DATE DD_ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DTM,
CAST(SCOOLA.ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') DV_ACTUAL_SHIPMENT_DT,
COALESCE(SCOOLA.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF,'-999') AS ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_LINE_REF_ID,
COALESCE(SCOOLA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF,'UNKNOWN') AS ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_WEB_ORDER_ID,
CASE WHEN  SCOOLA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF LIKE 'AA%' THEN SCOOLA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END SALES_ORDER_LINE_RMA_AAR_NUM,
COALESCE(MSIEB.C_EXT_ATTR2,'UNK') AS BOOKINGS_SOURCE_CD /*ADDED AS PART OF XAAS Q4FY15, TO IDENTIFY RECORDS FROM SBP*/
/* Added as part of PA Q1FY18 goponnus */
,CAST(ELA_IB.CONTRACT_START_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ELA_CONTRACT_START_DT
,CAST(ELA_IB.CONTRACT_END_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ELA_CONTRACT_END_DT
,COALESCE(ELA_IB.DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS ELA_DEAL_ID
, EXTN.BOOKING_SOURCE AS BOOKING_SOURCE ,
EXTN.HYBRID_OFFER_FLAG AS HYBRID_OFFER_FLAG,
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM AS PRDT_TRIAL_EXPIRATION_DTM,
ESOS.NAME AS BK_SO_SRC_NAME,
 /* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
COALESCE(NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-999) as END_CUST_ACCT_KEY ,
COALESCE(NSOLT.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD,'UNK') AS BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD,
/*Added as part of SFP Rel - NOV*/
NSOT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE AS BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SRC_TYPE,
COALESCE(NSOT.BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CD,
/*Added as part of FY22 PR21892 - EDW_AVENGERS_Q1FY22 */
CASE WHEN COALESCE(SCOOLA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999) IN (0,2) THEN 'SOWB' ELSE NSOT.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD END AS ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
COALESCE(SCOOLA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID,-999) AS ORC_ORDER_SOURCE_ID  ,
COALESCE(EXTN.LEASE_CLASSIFICATION,'UNKNOWN') AS INITIAL_PRODUCT_LEASE_TYPE_NAME,
ORG_SYSTEM_LINE_NUM 
FROM
( SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE AS ACV_INC_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES 
  WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_WI_SALES_ORDER_LINES_EXT_CG1'
  AND TABLE_NAME='WI_SALES_ORDER_LINES_EXT_CG1') EXT_BATCH,
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL SCOOLA 
LEFT JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT EXT
ON SCOOLA.LINE_ID = EXT.LINE_ID
/* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */		
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA 
ON NCA.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT = SCOOLA.END_CUSTOMER_ID
/* Added as part of Q2FY18 goponnus */
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
( SEL * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LN_E 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY LINE_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1) EXTN
ON EXTN.LINE_ID=SCOOLA.LINE_ID
/*ARAJANAL: ADDED AS PART OF XAAS ENABLEMENT Q4FY15*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN ($$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_EGO_MTL_SY_ITEMS_EXT_B MSIEB
					INNER JOIN
						(SELECT ATTR_GROUP_ID,DESCRIPTIVE_FLEX_CONTEXT_CODE
						FROM $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_EGO_FND_DSC_FLX_CTX_EXT
						WHERE DESCRIPTIVE_FLEX_CONTEXT_CODE='XXITM_ON_PREM_OFFER_EXT_ATTRS') EFDSC
					ON EFDSC.ATTR_GROUP_ID=MSIEB.ATTR_GROUP_ID
					AND MSIEB.ORGANIZATION_ID=1)
	ON SCOOLA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=MSIEB.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
/*END*/

/* ADDED as PART  of PA scope for Q1FY18 goponnus */
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_ELA_IB_CREDIT_STG ELA_IB
ON ELA_IB.SO_LINE_ID=SCOOLA.LINE_ID
/* END  Q1FY18 */ 

INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SCOOLA.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC  
ON( SCOOLA.ORG_ID=EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)  			
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE,SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT,SS_CODE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ORDER BY SS_CODE ASC)=1 )NCIO
ON	(SCOOLA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON(SCOOLA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID=NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='CG') 
 INNER JOIN $$GGSRCVWDB.GG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES MIC
 ON SCOOLA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = MIC.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
 AND MIC.ORGANIZATION_ID = 1
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_CG1_MTL_CATEGORIES MC
 ON MIC.CATEGORY_ID = MC.CATEGORY_ID
 INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_CG1_MTL_CATEGORY_SETS MCS
 ON MIC.CATEGORY_SET_ID = MCS.CATEGORY_SET_ID
 AND MCS.CATEGORY_SET_NAME = 'PROD GROUP'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
ON	( SCOOLA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )			
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL_PARENT 
	ON	( SCOOLA.TOP_MODEL_LINE_ID = SSOL_PARENT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT  AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = SSOL_PARENT.SS_CODE )
INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SO
				ON( NSSC_SO.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SCOOLA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SO.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSOT
ON( SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY)
     LEFT OUTER JOIN 
(
SELECT
CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
EFU_CR.USER_NAME END USER_NAME
, EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME, EFU_CR.USER_ID USER_ID 
FROM 
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_CR
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER		NEU
		ON
			NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_CR.USER_NAME
WHERE EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
group by 1,2,3
) EFU_CR
ON
EFU_CR.USER_ID = SCOOLA.CREATED_BY
AND
EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'                 
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
(
SEL 
CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
EFU_UPD.USER_NAME END USER_NAME, 
EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME , EFU_UPD.USER_ID USER_ID FROM 
		$$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_UPD
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER		NEU
		ON
			NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_UPD.USER_NAME
WHERE EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
group by 1,2,3
) EFU_UPD
ON
EFU_UPD.USER_ID = SCOOLA.LAST_UPDATED_BY
AND
EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ITEM_CLASS NIC   /*Added for Rel10 for deriving dv_option_class_line_flg   */
  ON (NP.BK_ITEM_CLASS_CODE=NIC.BK_ITEM_CLASS_CODE)
  /* commenting this join 
 /* BEGIN CASE AS PART OF SC-LSS Q3FY15 
 LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOVT
ON  NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
/*  END CASE AS PART OF SC-LSS Q3FY15 */   
INNER JOIN  
$$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_SOURCES ESOS
ON
(SCOOLA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=ESOS.SK_ORDER_SOURCE_ID AND             ESOS.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')

LEFT JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NRT NSOLT
ON NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SCOOLA.LINE_ID
		ORDER	BY SCOOLA.CREATE_DATETIME DESC	)  =1
) A
